mapper.select: SELECT pp.machine_no, COALESCE(SUM(pr.good_qty), 0) AS good_qty, COALESCE(SUM(pr.defect_qty), 0) AS defect_qty, COALESCE(SUM(pr.total_qty), 0) AS total_qty, COALESCE(SUM(pr.good_area), 0) AS good_area, COALESCE(SUM(pr.defect_area), 0) AS defect_area, COALESCE(SUM(pr.total_area), 0) AS total_area FROM production_plan pp LEFT JOIN production_result pr ON pp.plan_no = pr.plan_no WHERE pp.production_date = #{date}::DATE GROUP BY pp.machine_no ORDER BY pp.machine_no
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(good_qty), 0) AS good_qty, COALESCE(SUM(defect_qty), 0) AS defect_qty, COALESCE(SUM(total_qty), 0) AS total_qty FROM production_result WHERE production_date = #{date}::DATE

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(used_area), 0) AS used_area, COALESCE(SUM(loss_area), 0) AS loss_area, COALESCE(SUM(used_area), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(loss_area), 0) AS total_area, CASE WHEN (COALESCE(SUM(used_area), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(loss_area), 0)) > 0 THEN ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(loss_area), 0) * 100.0 / (COALESCE(SUM(used_area), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(loss_area), 0)), 1) ELSE 0 END AS loss_rate FROM cutting_daily_report WHERE report_date = #{date}::DATE

SELECT TO_CHAR(production_date, 'MM/DD') AS machine_no, COALESCE(SUM(good_qty), 0) AS good_qty, COALESCE(SUM(defect_qty), 0) AS defect_qty, COALESCE(SUM(total_qty), 0) AS total_qty FROM production_result WHERE production_date BETWEEN #{startDate}::DATE AND #{endDate}::DATE GROUP BY production_date ORDER BY production_date
SELECT location_type, COALESCE(SUM(quantity), 0) AS quantity FROM container_inventory GROUP BY location_type ORDER BY location_type
